hero.title: Fresh content. Every day.

hero.description:
Give us a keyword — we write the article.
Images, SEO, publishing — all automated.
WordPress, Ghost, Webflow — any platform.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to sign in
auth.signup_subtitle: Enter your details to get started
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.verify_sent_to: address — we sent a confirmation link.
auth.verify_sent_generic: We sent a confirmation link to your email.
auth.verify_hint: Check your inbox and click the link. You will be redirected to the dashboard automatically.
auth.verify_spam: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder.
auth.verify_error: Failed to resend. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.forgot_sent_desc: — a password reset link has been sent to this address.
auth.forgot_sent_hint: Check your inbox and click the link. The link is valid for 1 hour.
auth.forgot_sent_spam: Can't find it? Check your spam folder.
auth.magic_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a clickable login link.
auth.magic_sent_desc: Check your inbox and click the login link.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
